Battlefield Guide:
The battlefield behind me has the following rules.
Basic Rule Clan members will be affected by AoE damage because of the characteristics of the battlefield. But players in the same party or alliance won't be affected by AoE attacks from the members of the same party or alliance.
But the Cursed Sword lusts after blood, so even players are in the same party or alliance, everyone is a target to attack, so you'll attack everyone.
